name: 毒面霜真相大白＋反派伏法
name_en: Toxic Cream Truth Revealed + Villain Arrested
description: 三年前陷害男主母親的毒面霜案真相被揭露，反派父女親口承認罪行被錄音，當場被警方帶走。因果報應讓觀眾獲得正義伸張的滿足感。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: If you weren't so stupid, crying all the time about wanting to be the number two at Shang, would I have made the toxic face cream? Would I have framed Hu Chen's mom? / You're both suspected of financial crimes, framing others on purpose, and willful assault. You're coming with us. / Spend the rest of your life regretting this behind bars.
